_meta.scope: Full-database dead-product sweep (owner: 'check the entire database'). All 476 remaining products re-scanned brand by brand; 10 new suspects web-verified 2026-07-21. Replacements per owner standard: MODERN and AVAILABLE ONLINE.
findings_kept: Lacoste line (6+ rows): license moved Coty -> Interparfums Jan 2024; L.12.12 range still deeply stocked online. KEEP, watch list.
Tom Ford Velvet Orchid: conflicting reports, still sold at Amazon/Fragrance Outlet. KEEP, watch list.
Guess Effect (2021) verified REAL and current; the catalog's 'Guess Effect Sport' name is a corruption of it (renamed below).
_meta.provenance: Pyramids compiled from general knowledge or from today's sourced research (noted per entry). No scraped content.

replacement.name: Viva La Juicy
replacement.description: Juicy berries over honeysuckle and a caramel-praline base. A modern gourmand staple that keeps on selling.

replacement.name: Noir Extreme
replacement.description: Spiced mandarin and a dessert-like kulfi heart over warm amber and sandalwood. The Noir line's current standard-bearer.

replacement.name: Acqua di Giò Profumo
replacement.description: The Acqua di Giò sea breeze deepened with incense and patchouli. Darker, smokier and widely considered the best of the line.

replacement.name: Acqua di Giò Profumo
replacement.description: The Acqua di Giò sea breeze deepened with incense and patchouli. Darker, smokier and widely considered the best of the line.

replacement.name: Perfect
replacement.description: Tart rhubarb over creamy almond milk and soft woods. A modern hit with an optimistic, easygoing character.

replacement.name: Halfeti
replacement.description: Black rose and saffron over oud and leather. Rich, spicy and one of the house's most loved modern releases.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: the cut row 'Halfeti Pour Femme' does not exist as a product. Halfeti is unisex; verified against Penhaligon's line 2026-07-21. Same product, corrected identity.

replacement.name: The Coveted Duchess Rose
replacement.description: A bright rose lifted by mandarin and lychee over clean musk. Polished, regal and easy to wear.
replacement.note: The cut row 'Tragedy of Lord George Pour Femme' does not exist; Lord George is a men's Portrait (verified 2026-07-21). Replaced with the line's women's Portrait. Pyramid flagged for verification against the brand page.

replacement.name: Guess Effect
replacement.description: Bright grapefruit and pineapple over herbs and creamy woods. A modern, affordable fresh-aromatic.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: 'Guess Effect Sport' does not exist; Guess Effect (2021) verified real and current 2026-07-21. Pyramid sourced from retailer listings the same day.

replacement.name: Le Male
replacement.description: Cool mint and lavender over sweet vanilla. One of the best-selling men's fragrances ever made, and still everywhere.
replacement.note: The cut row 'Tommy Sport' does not exist as a product (verified 2026-07-21; Hilfiger's sport releases are named Hilfiger Man Sport / Freedom Sport). Replaced with a modern, universally available bestseller.
